description_long: This is a vintage-style biplane with a bright red fuselage and dual straight wings stacked one above the other, supported by yellow struts. The nose features a circular engine cowling with a visible propeller, and the cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing. The tail section is adorned with a tricolor horizontal stabilizer and a single vertical fin, both matching the red color scheme with yellow and black accents. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid, all fixed and non-retractable. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century fighter aircraft, with a compact, lightweight structure and minimalistic detailing.
description: A classic red biplane with dual stacked wings, open cockpit, and fixed landing gear, featuring vintage design elements and a visible front propeller.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red fuselage, open cockpit, and the tricolor tail fin with yellow and black stripes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular engine cowling, central propeller, and the symmetrical dual wings supported by yellow struts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the open cockpit, red fuselage, and the tail section with its distinctive color bands.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizer, and the open cockpit behind the upper wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers; tail features tricolor markings.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a rear tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, mid-fuselage.
